creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
- Update to new stable version 1.10

Fix: PORTNAME=	mediawiki
-PORTVERSION=	1.9.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.10.0
 CATEGORIES=	www
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	wikipedia
+MASTER_SITES=	http://download.wikimedia.org/mediawiki/1.10/

 MAINTAINER=	gerrit.beine@gmx.de
 COMMENT=	The wiki engine used by Wikipedia

-CONFLICTS=	mediawiki-1.[0-79].*
+CONFLICTS=	mediawiki-1.[0-9].* mediawiki-1.1[1-9].*

 NO_BUILD=	yes
 USE_MYSQL=	yes
